category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Mauritius market.

title.en: China-to-Mauritius LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入毛里求斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入模里西斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Mauritius requirements administered by the Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) — adopted MS/IEC standards for luminaires (MS/IEC 60598), light sources (IEC 62560), photobiological safety (IEC 62471), energy efficiency labelling, and ICTA radio-equipment requirements for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Mauritius applies a 230 V / 50 Hz grid. Mauritius does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS or REACH SVHC regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与毛里求斯要求差距对照——由毛里求斯标准局（MSB）管理：采用的灯具 MS/IEC 标准（MS/IEC 60598）、光源（IEC 62560）、光生物安全（IEC 62471）、能效标签，以及智能灯具的 ICTA 无线电设备要求——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。毛里求斯采用 230 V / 50 Hz 电网。毛里求斯不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 或 REACH SVHC 制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與模里西斯要求差距對照——由模里西斯標準局（MSB）管理：採用的燈具 MS/IEC 標準（MS/IEC 60598）、光源（IEC 62560）、光生物安全（IEC 62471）、能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 ICTA 無線電設備要求——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。模里西斯採用 230 V / 50 Hz 電網。模里西斯不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 或 REACH SVHC 制度。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mauritius law, Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) adopted standards and conformity requirements, energy labelling requirements, and ICTA radio-equipment obligations with qualified professionals and an in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及当地进口商核验现行毛里求斯法律、毛里求斯标准局（MSB）采用标准及合格评定要求、能效标签要求及 ICTA 无线电设备义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及當地進口商核驗現行模里西斯法律、模里西斯標準局（MSB）採用標準及合格評定要求、能效標籤要求及 ICTA 無線電設備義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Mauritius should expect the Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) to be the central reference body — MSB adopts Mauritius Standards (MS), typically aligned with IEC, and operates conformity and import-inspection arrangements for regulated products. Practical compliance points: confirm electrical safety to the MSB-adopted MS/IEC 60598 series (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps); supply EMC evidence aligned with CISPR 15 (the IEC base shared by China GB 17743); document photobiological safety to IEC 62471 where applicable; engage with the Mauritius energy-efficiency labelling programme for lamps where in scope; and obtain ICTA (Information and Communication Technologies Authority) type approval for any smart luminaire with wireless functionality. Design for a 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China 220 V). Mauritius does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS substance restriction or a REACH SVHC supply-chain notification regime — those EU-only obligations have no direct Mauritius counterpart, though China RoHS disclosure practice still applies for the China market. None of the Mauritius market-access steps are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification, which is not recognised in Mauritius. Verify all requirements with MSB and an in-country importer before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 出口至毛里求斯的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期毛里求斯标准局（MSB）为核心参考机构——MSB 制定毛里求斯标准（MS），通常与 IEC 对齐，并对受管制产品实行合格评定及进口检验安排。实务合规要点：按 MSB 采用的 MS/IEC 60598 系列（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）确认电气安全；提供与 CISPR 15（中国 GB 17743 共享的 IEC 基础）对齐的 EMC 证据；在适用时按 IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；在适用范围内参与毛里求斯灯具能效标签计划；并为任何具备无线功能的智能灯具取得 ICTA（信息通信技术局）型号核准。按 230 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压与中国 220 V 不同）。毛里求斯不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 物质限制或 REACH SVHC 供应链通报制度——这些仅限欧盟的义务在毛里求斯无直接对应，但中国 RoHS 披露做法仍适用于中国市场。上述毛里求斯市场准入步骤均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖，且 CCC 在毛里求斯不被认可。出货前请向 MSB 及当地进口商核验所有要求。
answer_first.zht: 出口至模里西斯的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期模里西斯標準局（MSB）為核心參考機構——MSB 制定模里西斯標準（MS），通常與 IEC 對齊，並對受管制產品實行合格評定及進口檢驗安排。實務合規要點：按 MSB 採用的 MS/IEC 60598 系列（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）確認電氣安全；提供與 CISPR 15（中國 GB 17743 共享的 IEC 基礎）對齊的 EMC 證據；在適用時按 IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；在適用範圍內參與模里西斯燈具能效標籤計劃；並為任何具備無線功能的智能燈具取得 ICTA（信息通信技術局）型號核准。按 230 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同）。模里西斯不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 物質限制或 REACH SVHC 供應鏈通報制度——這些僅限歐盟的義務在模里西斯無直接對應，但中國 RoHS 披露做法仍適用於中國市場。上述模里西斯市場准入步驟均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋，且 CCC 在模里西斯不被認可。出貨前請向 MSB 及當地進口商核驗所有要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Mauritius regulator (MSB, ICTA), standards body, adopted MS/IEC standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. MSB adopted-standard editions, conformity/import-inspection scope, energy-labelling scope, and ICTA type-approval requirements must be re-verified against current MSB and ICTA publications on each review cycle.
